items: Clone remains event-calendar oriented; original /Reminder is reminder-table oriented.
Clone uses staff stats, role/department filters, invite/export, and permissions modals; original uses a simpler Employees/Outsourcers table and quota view.
Clone uses expanded General, Statuses, Round Settings, Notifications, Portal, Service Plans, Tags, and Integrations tabs; original starts with Custom Status and default status table.
Clone keeps a modern save/reset preview workflow; original uses Edit Settings and broader company setting fields in a single product-shell page.
Clone keeps editable portal/mobile settings; original page is mostly links, Q&A, video prompts, and mobile app download guidance.
